raw_consumer_statement: 100 % Guaranteed refund was in the works, after refunding {$5500.00} of {$29000.00} the process stopped. Chargeback to Citibank rescinded with a letter saying {$1900.00} will be added back to my XXXX Citibank Card. Following that decision means two more Chargeback amounts, {$600.00} and {$4800.00} will soon follow. It was a Citibank customer service representative who identified those charges and assisted me in filing the chargeback amounts, even noting the refunds that commenced in XXXX.
